PHONE_SECURITY.TITLE: Phone Number Security
PHONE_SECURITY.PHONE_FORMAT_ERROR: Please enter a valid phone number in E.164 format
PHONE_SECURITY.VERIFY_DESCRIPTION: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to your phone number. Please enter it below.
PHONE_SECURITY.PHONE_NUMBER_EXISTS: This phone number is already in use
PHONE_SECURITY.PHONE_ADDED_SUCCESS: Phone number added and verified successfully
PHONE_SECURITY.CONFIRM_REMOVE: Are you sure you want to remove your phone number? This will disable phone-based login and recovery.
PHONE_SECURITY.SECURITY_INFO_1: Your phone number is used for account recovery and additional security
PHONE_SECURITY.SECURITY_INFO_2: You can sign in using either your email or verified phone number
PHONE_SECURITY.SECURITY_INFO_3: We'll never share your phone number with third parties
